feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Unarmoured
entry.summary:
Author: HowDidIGetHere20

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 399,827Chapters: 89/100Kudos: 512

Summary: Arthur has always taken Merlin on every mission — unarmoured, untrained, endlessly reckless. It never used to matter. But lately, every danger feels sharper. Every close call lasts too long. And Merlin is starting to notice the way Arthur hovers… and how the prince’s worry is beginning to look a lot like something else. A slow-burn story about devotion disguised as duty, love revealed through quiet choices, and the people who become home when the world turns dangerous. Love wins — even when it has to fight for it. Written with a companion playlist (linked in the notes) :)

entry.title: The Magical Experiment
entry.summary:
Author: twobraincellscombined

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,702Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 181

Summary: Arthur asks Merlin to learn magic to see if it can be trusted in defeating Morgana.   "We want to ask someone to learn magic to see if it can be used without corrupting the soul of the person who uses it. Lancelot suggested you be the person we ask." Merlin's lips parted a fraction, "He did?" "Indeed. Something about your heart being pure." Arthur brushed the compliment off with a wave of his hand and straightened in his seat, "I know you're scared of magic so you don’t have to do this if you don’t want to but-" "I'll do it."

entry.title: be steady, my love, be steady
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,148Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin returned to the bedside a moment later, pressing cool fingers briefly to Arthur’s wrist, then his forehead, expression creased with focus. Arthur endured this with the long-suffering dignity of a king under siege. “You are hovering,” he informed Merlin. Freya spoke gently into the space between them. “He is worrying. There is a difference.”

entry.title: The Squires of Camelot
entry.summary:
Author: Basched

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,600Chapters: 166/?Kudos: 142

Summary: In a land of myth and a time of magic, destiny rests on the shoulders of five young boys, along with a lot of grueling work, dedication, and long hours of cleaning up after the new knights. They are the Squires of Camelot.

entry.title: Blood, Sweat and Tears
entry.summary:
Author: itsmepaper

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,932Chapters: 3/15Kudos: 27

Summary: Merlin disappears in the middle of the night, leaving behind nothing but a scream heard by a nearby servant, a smear of blood, and a castle full of unanswered questions. Arthur is convinced it’s just Merlin being Merlin, until the hours stretch on, the clues grow stranger, and the fear in Camelot becomes impossible to ignore. Arthur goes off on a journey to find the missing Merlin, to bring him home, back to Camelot. But that’s harder than Arthur could have ever imagined.

entry.title: The Weight of Unspoken Things
entry.summary:
Author: SunPyramid

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,356Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 35

Summary: In a Camelot ruled by fear, Merlin hides more than just magic—he hides the love he can never confess. As Arthur begins to defy Uther’s cruelty, suspicion turns toward the servant who stands closest to the prince. With traps set, loyalties tested, and feelings brought dangerously close to the surface, both must face the question they fear most: how much are they willing to risk—for truth, for freedom, and for each other?

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,073Chapters: 17/24Kudos: 159

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Hollow Dark
entry.summary:
Author: hungryhippolyta

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,468Chapters: 16/25Kudos: 200

Summary: Fourteen hundred years before Lyra Belacqua's fateful discoveries, the nature of Dust is an arcane mystery. Sorcerers, warlocks and witches roam the island of Albion, forced into hiding by a ruthless King and a Magisterium still in its infancy. The future of Brytain will be determined by those who can control Dust...or by those who seek to destroy it. Meanwhile, Merlin, a young warlock fleeing persecution, finds a new home right under the nose of his greatest enemy. He's destined to protect the Once and Future King -- but then again, the dragon in the basement might be a bit cracked in the head. And between hiding his magic from one Uther Pendragon and keeping his still-unsettled dæmon a secret, Merlin's got enough on his plate already...

entry.title: Cosa Nostra
entry.summary:
Author: bad_peppermint

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,882Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Arthur’s not stupid. He knows people think bartending is a cop-out for him. That he’s wasting his time and potential tending someone else’s bar while he could be the one calling the shots, the one sitting in that office on the second floor, hiding shady dealings in the crisp numbers on the page. He could be, but he’s not.

entry.title: Weathering The Storm
entry.summary:
Author: Wolfish_Potato

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,329Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 38

Summary: “Merlin! Don't close your eyes, damnit!” Arthur shook him and very nearly overbalanced and sent them both tumbling back down the hillside. He had Merlin halfway draped over his shoulders, one hand securely around his waist and the other holding his wrist to keep him from sliding. They should have caught up with the rest of the patrol yesterday, but then there had been the boar. Or An attack forces Merlin to reveal his magic, but when he's injured in the process and a storm strands them alone, Arthur has to act quickly, or risk losing Merlin forever.

entry.title: i'd meet you where the spirit meets the bones
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 880Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Merlin looked at him.Arthur held his gaze steadily.“You are my king,” Merlin said before Arthur could speak, the words sudden and fierce and utterly certain. “Not because of some prophecy dictated.”Arthur’s breath caught, just slightly.Merlin stepped closer.“Because I choose to serve you.”

entry.title: Pendragon and Wyllt: Paper Dragon
entry.summary:
Author: ChapChaph

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,837Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 9

Summary: In the modern city of Camelot, the magical criminal Emrys’s calling card is found near the body of a murder victim. Merlin Wyllt, the man behind Emrys, has made a point of never hurting anyone during his criminal activities and is determined to find the real culprit and clear his alter ego’s name. Opportunity falls into his lap when police detective Arthur Pendragon attempts to recruit him as a special expert on Camelot’s Magicside for the investigation. Apparently, Arthur also believes Emrys is being framed. Of course, there is the issue that Arthur's father is the reason Merlin's father is in prison, falsely accused of murder. And that Arthur is a prat, if a ridiculously handsome one. But working with him seems a small price to pay for access to any information the police might have on the case. And Merlin knows Arthur is different from his father. As the two men work together, they find themselves falling for each other. But can that work out, considering all that stands between them? And can they find the murderer before they kill again?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: [Podfic] in your heart shall burn
entry.summary:
Author: SpaceshipsAndWine

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 2

Summary: A decennial hunt draws neighboring princes to Camelot to track a dangerous three-headed beast, but things go south when one of them starts pursuing Merlin instead. Podfic of microcomets' story.

entry.title: More Love (Than I Could Have Asked For)
entry.summary:
Author: livinginthetheater

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,307Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 95

Summary: Merlin buried his face in his hands. “Alright, fine, things were certainly . . . more than friendly. But I maintain that I did not sleep with either of them!” Arthur’s world had tipped over. Merlin was the one that the visitors had wanted? It wasn’t a shock—Arthur found Merlin to be far prettier than either of them, after all—but to know that they had . . . dallied with his best friend made his skin crawl.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: To the god at my feet, I offer sanctuary
entry.summary:
Author: TimesOnlyReason

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,235Chapters: 11/18Kudos: 98

Summary: In a flash of motion the blade of Excalibur rests against the hollow of Merlin's neck. ‘You are not fighting back,’ Arthur breathes with the shock and disgust a man can only feel when expecting pain and not receiving it, ‘is it out of trust, or do you truly not care if you die?’ ‘If it is by your hand, I would make no attempt to stop it’ Merlin replies, breathing just as heavy, a small shake of his head and scrunch of his brow - as if the answer were obvious. If this was what the king wanted - if this was how a destiny ends - for once in his life Merlin would comply with the order freely. -------During a bandit attack Arthur discovers Merlin's magic.How will this change them? Or have they already changed too much for it to matter? Can you truly hide who you are, or are you doomed to be known? UPDATED SCHEDULE - 1 chapter on Tuesdays and Saturdays (2 chapters a week)

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • Merlin & Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

  • It's never addressed but that's the plot we are going with
  • no beta we die in the arms of our soulmate on a beach
  • Fuck AI

entry.title: fret not, dear heart, let not them hear the mutterings of all your fears
entry.summary:
Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,039Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: “Winter is harder,” she said. Simple. Matter-of-fact. Years of hunger and cold packed neatly into three words. Merlin’s chest tightened.
